en-US.title: Selah: Bible & Prayer
en-US.subtitle: Read, plan, pray, memorize
en-US.description:
Selah is a quiet place to read Scripture, follow a plan, pray, and hide verses in your heart.

No accounts. No ads. No noise. Your reading, prayers, notes, and progress live on your device — the app works fully offline, and everything about it is built to help you slow down.

READ
• A clean, beautiful reader with highlights and inline notes
• Multiple translations, side-by-side comparison, and full-text search
• Download your translation once and read everywhere — no connection needed

PLANS
• Reading plans with a visible finish date and grace when you fall behind
• A gentle "catch me up" that resets the pace without erasing history
• Invite friends with a short code and quietly cheer each other on

PRAY
• Prayer lists that reset daily or weekly, with streaks and answered prayers
• Gentle reminders like "a moment for your list" — never nagging
• A home-screen widget that rotates through your requests and lets you mark them prayed right from the widget

MEMORIZE
• Verses fade as you learn them — blanks grow with your progress until you can say the whole verse from memory
• Build-it word games, flashcards, and spaced repetition with named stages
• A widget that keeps your current verse in front of you all day

Selah means pause. That's the whole idea.
en-US.releaseNotes: Selah's first release: read Scripture offline, follow reading plans with friends, keep prayer lists with gentle reminders and home-screen widgets, and memorize verses that fade as you learn them.
